items.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Unveils AI-Powered ‘Copilot Mode’ for Edge Browser
items.description: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is one of the AI Stocks in the Spotlight Today. On July 28, the company announced the launch of a new “Copilot Mode” for its Edge browser. The Copilot Mode leverages artificial intelligence to improve the browsing experience for its users, helping carry out tasks, organize browsing, and even compare results across tabs […]

items.title: A 5-Stock Dividend Growth Portfolio For Strong Total Returns
items.description: Dividend growth stocks provide growing income, inflation protection, and stability, making them essential for long-term, diversified portfolios. See more here.

items.title: Strong earnings from Meta, Microsoft but misses 1 critical metric
items.description: Both Meta and Microsoft have strong quarterly earnings that beat analysts' expectations, but neither company mentioned crypto or stablecoins in their calls or reports.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures rise ahead of key inflation data, with Apple and Amazon to report
items.description: Wall Street weighed a new trade deal with South Korea and strong earnings from Meta and Microsoft.

items.title: Telnyx expands conversational AI stack with new audio, TTS, and integration capabilities
items.description: These latest updates make it easier for teams to deliver high-quality, production-ready voice experiences at scale.AUSTIN, TX, July 30, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Telnyx, a global leader in communications infrastructure, today announced a wave of platform updates that enhance the core capabilities of its conversational AI stack. The release includes Azure Neural HD text-to-speech, built-in noise suppression, MCP server integration, embeddable AI Agent widgets, and robust tools for versioning and t
